name: Staff Architecture Review Rubric
instructions: Evaluate whether the architectural review demonstrates evidence-backed Staff-level judgment, pragmatic Django expertise, and actionable prioritization.

evidence_quality.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if findings consistently cite specific files, repository structures, or observable implementation patterns. Score 1 if conclusions are unsupported or speculative.

hallucination_resistance.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if uncertainty is acknowledged and unsupported claims are discarded. Score 1 if the review invents missing structures or overstates confidence.

django_pragmatism.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if recommendations favor incremental, Django-native improvements. Score 1 if the review defaults to enterprise patterns such as unnecessary service layers, DTOs, or excessive decomposition.

operational_reasoning.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if the review identifies realistic reliability, observability, performance, or scaling risks grounded in the codebase. Score 1 if recommendations remain purely theoretical.

prioritization_quality.criteria: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if recommendations are ranked according to impact, effort, and business trade-offs. Score 1 if the report treats all findings as equally important.
